name: ada_default
description: Vanilla ADA Standards for Accessible Design (2010) minimums
source: ADA Standards for Accessible Design (2010): §404.2.3 (32" / 0.813 m clear doorway), §403.5.1 (36" / 0.914 m corridor), §303.3 (0.5" / 0.0127 m unbeveled threshold), §405.2 (1:12 / 4.76 deg max ramp running slope), §403.3 (1:48 / 1.15 deg max cross slope)
